events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: trench protection compliance check. Observed condition: no ladder within 25 ft lateral travel. OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires means of egress (ladder, ramp, stairway) in trench excavations 4 ft or more in depth, located so workers require no more than 25 ft of lateral travel. No ladder within 25 ft = non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: high (trench without egress is serious). Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 80. Value 0. Confidence high.
